Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
FC chest Tab 2 sync fix:
- Detects FC chest tab changes from explicit inventory event page data.
- Trusts tabs with confirmed item changes so Tab 2 can repair stuck dashboard values.
- Narrows selected-tab UI detection to the real 1-5 chest tab row.
